violations.text: Items that were available for self service were lacking available ingredient information. PIC stated, sign will be posted on self service areas. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
Pasta hot hold door gasket was observed in poor repair. Door not sealing well. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be emptied and washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

The following sinks were observed blocked/not accessible at the time of inspection... - A hand-washing sink in the Homestyle food service area was observed to have a sanitizer bucket placed in it. - The hand sink near the pizza area was observed to be blocked by rolling racks. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Both hand sinks were made accessible at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Several food items cold held in refrigeration in various areas of the food service area were observed held at 44 to 52 degrees Fahrenheit (see temperatures). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per the PIC, the food items were all loaded from colder refrigeration just prior to lunch service. Food items were moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

At the time of inspection, two snap traps with a dead rodent in each were observed in the kitchen area. Dead pests shall be removed from control devices and the PREMISES at a frequency that prevents their accumulation, decomposition, or the attraction of pests. Dead rodents were removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

The cutting boards in the food service area(s) were observed to be very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The following refrigeration units were observed in need of repair/adjustment... - The Glass Door Cooler in the Homestyle Service Area was observed at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was adjusted to colder setting at the time of inspection. - The Burrito Cold Well was observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 38 to 57 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit adjusted to a colder setting at the time of inspection. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair and properly adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

The ice machine in the kitchen area is lacking a proper air gap (currently has an air break at the floor drain). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Ice Machine drain pipes to be adjusted for a proper air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
Cans of crushed tomatoes were observed with rodent droppings. Food was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

An aerosolized can of unapproved insecticide was observed in the ware-washing area. Only those POISONOUS OR TOXIC MATERIALS that are required for the operation and maintenance of a FOOD ESTABLISHMENT, such as for the cleaning and SANITIZING of EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS and the control of insects and rodents (as used by pest control company), shall be allowed in a FOOD ESTABLISHMENT. Person in charge elected to dispose of product at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the war-ewashing and breakfast burrito dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023
